title: Roasted Italian Cauliflower
description: A simple and flavorful side dish that combines the crunch of cauliflower with the flavors of Italy.
instructions: Rinse the cauliflower and remove the leaves and stem.
In a large bowl, toss the cauliflower with the roast, garlic, salt, and pepper until evenly coated.
Spread the cauliflower mixture on a baking sheet in a single layer.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
Remove from oven and sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parmesan cheese if desired.
